name: MediCopilot
description: AI Clinical Copilot — generates structured pre-visit patient briefings using FHIR data, multi-agent RAG reasoning, drug safety checking, risk scoring, and SOAP note generation.
author: MediCopilot Team

agents.name: FHIRAgent
agents.role: Fetches patient bundle from FHIR R4 server

agents.name: RAGAgent
agents.role: Retrieves relevant medical guidelines from FAISS

agents.name: DiagnosisAgent
agents.role: Generates differential diagnosis with confidence scores

agents.name: SecondOpinionAgent
agents.role: Challenges primary diagnosis for balanced assessment

agents.name: SOAPNoteGenerator
agents.role: Synthesizes all outputs into clinical SOAP documentation
